title: Front Office Manager - WelcomHeritage - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - WelcomHeritage - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, WelcomHeritage in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About WelcomHeritage:
WelcomHeritage is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WelcomHeritage!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
